metadata.description: Per-scene gold spatial relation-graphs with a DESCRIPTIVE multi-path-redundancy prevalence annotation (the spatial analog of the temporal a-priori N* gate). No closure, no LLM. datasets[] contains the 4 STANDARDIZED corpora; prevalence_table covers all 6 EVALUATED corpora (4 standardized + 2 evaluated extras).
metadata.schema_note: input=story text; output=JSON {nodes,edges,query_edge}; structural metrics also surfaced as metadata_* fields.
metadata.root_node_handling: world/image container id '-1' excluded from the primary structural graph (non-constraining containment).
metadata.primary_4_rationale: The BEST-4 span the four qualitatively distinct text-type x structure regimes the gate must characterise: SpaRP-PS1 = dense-templated HIGH-redundancy venue (27.4% tight bite, general); SpartQA-Human = semi-natural/human MODEST redundancy (useful-module band); StepGame-clean = single-chain ZERO-by-construction contrast; ReSQ = genuinely-natural anchor (no recoverable scene graph => natural boundary).
metadata.evaluated_extras_note: SpaRP-PS2 (StepGame-Ext): 10.4% raw but 0.9% TIGHT bite -- redundancy is mostly long loose paths (verify-empirically finding). SpartQA-Auto: large templated dense sample, 3.5% bite (niche).
